key_metric: enforced for govt/OA/net-metering since Apr 2021
highlights: Approved List of Models & Manufacturers restricting eligible solar module models/makers in government, open-access and net-metering projects; first List-I issued Mar 2021 and updated regularly (latest revision Jul 2026).

key_metric: ~30 GW listed cell capacity; in force 1 Jun 2026
highlights: From 1 June 2026 every ALMM List-I module must use domestically produced solar cells drawn from the approved List-II, with only case-by-case relief for advanced projects.

key_metric: effective 1 Jun 2028; needs 15 GW domestic wafer capacity
highlights: Extends ALMM up the supply chain to solar wafers and ingots, requiring domestically produced wafers in projects commissioned on/after 1 June 2028 once ~15 GW of independent capacity is enlisted.

key_metric: cells 20% BCD +7.5% AIDC; modules 20% BCD +20% AIDC (eff ~40%)
highlights: Import tariff protecting domestic manufacturing; Budget 2025 cut headline BCD to 20% but layered on AIDC, so effective duty on modules stays near 40% and cells ~27.5%.

scheme: PLI - High Efficiency Solar PV Modules
key_metric: Rs 24,000 cr across 2 tranches; ~48 GW awarded
highlights: Production-linked incentives (Tranche-I Apr 2021 Rs 4,500 cr; Tranche-II Sep 2022 Rs 19,500 cr) to build gigawatt-scale fully integrated poly-to-module domestic manufacturing.

key_metric: 16-digit DCR certificate mandatory since 1 Dec 2024
highlights: Mandates India-made cells and modules (now verified via the NISE DCR portal) in PM Surya Ghar, PM-KUSUM Components B&C and CPSU Phase-II projects.

scheme: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana
key_metric: 1 crore homes; up to Rs 78,000 subsidy; Rs 75,021 cr outlay
highlights: Flagship rooftop-solar scheme giving up to 300 free units/month to 1 crore households with central subsidy up to Rs 78,000 per home.

key_metric: 34,800 MW target; deadline extended to 31 Mar 2027
highlights: Agri-solar mission across decentralized ground-mount plants (A), standalone solar pumps (B) and grid-connected pump solarisation (C); completion window extended to March 2027.

key_metric: rises to 43.33% RCO by FY2029-30
highlights: Mandatory renewable/non-fossil consumption obligation for obligated entities under the Energy Conservation Act, escalating from ~29.9% (FY25) to 43.33% by FY2029-30.

key_metric: 100% waiver ended 30 Jun 2025; nil after 30 Jun 2028
highlights: Inter-state transmission charge waiver for solar/wind now phasing down (graded 75%-50%-25%) for projects connecting Jul 2025-Jun 2028 and ending entirely thereafter.

key_metric: 5 MMT/yr green H2 by 2030; Rs 19,744 cr outlay
highlights: Rs 19,744 cr mission (including SIGHT electrolyser and hydrogen-production incentives) to make India a green-hydrogen hub producing 5 MMT/yr by 2030.

key_metric: 12,000 MW target; VGF; ~8.2 GW sanctioned
highlights: Viability gap funding for government producers (NTPC, SJVN, NHPC, NLC etc.) to build solar capacity using mandatorily domestic (DCR) cells and modules.

key_metric: 30 GWh; Rs 5,400 cr; up to Rs 18 lakh/MWh
highlights: Viability gap funding for standalone battery energy storage, expanded in 2025 to 30 GWh (from the original ~Sep 2023 scheme) to catalyse ~Rs 33,000 cr of investment.

scheme: ISTS Charge Waiver for Energy Storage (BESS/PSP)
key_metric: 100% waiver for BESS/PSP commissioned by 30 Jun 2028
highlights: Extends full inter-state transmission charge waiver to co-located battery storage and pumped-hydro storage projects commissioned up to 30 June 2028.

key_metric: 1 GW (500 MW each Gujarat & TN); Rs 7,453 cr
highlights: Rs 7,453 cr viability gap funding for India's first 1 GW of offshore wind off Gujarat and Tamil Nadu, plus Rs 600 cr for port upgrades.

scheme: National Wind Repowering & Life Extension Policy 2023
key_metric: targets sub-2 MW & >15-yr-old turbines
highlights: Enables repowering/refurbishment and life-extension of old or low-capacity wind turbines with full new-project fiscal benefits and an IREDA interest-rate rebate.

key_metric: mandatory approved-list major components; India R&D/data
highlights: Renames RLMM as ALMM (Wind) and mandates use of approved-list domestic major turbine components (blade, tower, gearbox, generator, bearings) with India-located R&D/servers.

key_metric: Rs 4,440 cr; ~1.5 GW electrolyser capacity
highlights: Green Hydrogen Mission SIGHT Tranche-II incentive (Rs 4,440 cr) to build ~1.5 GW/yr of domestic electrolyser manufacturing across FY26-FY30.

scheme: Model Solar Village (under PM Surya Ghar)
key_metric: Rs 800 cr; Rs 1 cr CFA per village; 1 village/district
highlights: PM Surya Ghar component earmarking Rs 800 cr (Rs 1 cr per village) to create one self-sustaining model solar village in every district by FY2026-27.

key_metric: storage-backed firm RE; multiple SECI GWh tenders
highlights: SECI procurement construct (scaled up through 2024-2026) bundling solar/wind with co-located BESS to deliver demand-following, dispatchable clean power to DISCOMs.
